name: websites-to-worlds
description: Turn an existing website, portfolio, product page, documentation site, or content library into a polished, content-complete, explorable 3D web world with Three.js or a similar web-3D stack.

interface.longDescription: A portable agent skill that guides Codex through turning an existing website into a playable, content-complete 3D world with first-person navigation, HUD, onboarding, interaction, browser QA, and a maintainable update path.
defaultPrompt: Use $websites-to-worlds:websites-to-worlds to turn this website into a mature, content-complete, explorable 3D world.
